howItWorks.intro: This heat pump savings calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: COP Advantage
rules.explanation: Heat pumps deliver 3x the energy they consume.

howItWorks.outro: Energy costs and incentives change by region and season. Check with your local utility for current rates.

faq.q: Are heat pumps cheaper to run?
faq.a: Usually yes, heat pumps are 2-3x more efficient. Savings depend on gas vs electric prices.

faq.q: Do heat pumps work in cold climates?
faq.a: Modern cold-climate heat pumps work efficiently down to -15°F.

howWeCalculate.intro: This heat pump savings calculator uses established formulas and current data to provide accurate estimates.
